task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Customer Service Lead' role was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the 'Roles' grid with 'Customer Service Lead' listed, or a success message indicating the role was saved.

task_completion.description: Verify that the role has access to Dashboard, Sales, and Customers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the Role Resources tab for 'Customer Service Lead' showing 'Resource Access' set to 'Custom', with the checkboxes for 'Dashboard', 'Sales', and 'Customers' checked.

task_completion.description: Verify that the role does NOT have access to Catalog, Marketing, Content, Reports, Stores, or System.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the Role Resources tab for 'Customer Service Lead' showing the checkboxes for 'Catalog', 'Marketing', 'Content', 'Reports', 'Stores', and 'System' unchecked.

task_completion.description: Verify that the active admin user 'cs_lead_jones' was created with the correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the 'Users' grid with Username 'cs_lead_jones', First Name 'Patricia', Last Name 'Jones', Email 'patricia.jones@example.com', and status 'Active', or the User Information form filled with these details along with a success message.

task_completion.description: Verify that the user 'cs_lead_jones' is assigned to the 'Customer Service Lead' role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the 'User Role' tab for the user 'cs_lead_jones' showing the 'Customer Service Lead' radio button selected, or the Users grid showing 'Customer Service Lead' in the Role column for this user.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Magento Admin GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Magento Admin panel, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show actual Magento admin pages (Roles and Users grids, or edit forms) rather than a text editor or mockups.

integrity.description: Verify the results are from genuine software interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The visual evidence of the role and user creation appears consistent with normal Magento UI rendering, without signs of manipulated DOM elements or inspect element tampering.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected role name is 'Customer Service Lead'. The expected user details are Username: 'cs_lead_jones', First Name: 'Patricia', Last Name: 'Jones', Email: 'patricia.jones@example.com'. The role must have access to Dashboard, Sales, and Customers, and must not have access to Catalog, Marketing, Content, Reports, Stores, or System. In Magento, this is done by setting Resource Access to 'Custom' and checking/unchecking the respective boxes in the Role Resources tree.
